summary: The chapter begins with an author receiving an email proposing a remake of his discontinued webnovel, "The Returnee Hero." Shortly after, he finds himself inexplicably trapped within the world of his own novel, inhabiting the body of an 'extra' character named Kim Chundong, a cadet at the prestigious CUBE hero training school. Realizing he must survive and advance the story to find a way back, he soon discovers a package containing his original novel's setup book, which initiates a "synchronization" process that resets his stats and grants him a unique authority called "Setting Intervention" as Kim Hajin.
key_moments: The author receives an email proposing a remake of his discontinued webnovel, "The Returnee Hero."
He realizes he is trapped in his novel's world, possessing the body of Kim Chundong, an 'extra' at CUBE hero training school.
A synchronization process begins after he finds his own novel's setup book, resetting his stats and granting him "Setting Intervention" authority as Kim Hajin.
